mnemonics: GREEN IT: Goals, Reduce, Efficiency, Energy, New tech, IT lifecycle
keyPoints: Green IT focuses on the environmental impact of the entire IT lifecycle, from manufacturing to disposal.
Its scope includes reducing energy consumption, using resources efficiently, and promoting recyclability.
It is a subset of broader corporate sustainability strategies, not a separate initiative.
commonMistakes: Thinking Green IT is only about saving energy in data centers; it ignores the full product lifecycle.
Believing sustainability is solely the responsibility of a dedicated 'green' team, not integral to all IT functions.
